title: Hydrophobicity Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"91v20","text":"P-Xylene Hydrophobicity Assay","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"76b9j","text":"Note that I have written this before doing it. Changes most likely will be made.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Grow 10mls OG1RF in BHI using short-term or long-term supplementation
At 0.3 OD for long-term or 30 minutes after supplementation for short-term, spin cells and wash twice using PUM buffer
Aliquot 1 ml 6 times into glass tubes and mix with a range of P-xylene volumes 0µl, 12.5µl, 25µl, 50µl, 100µl, and 200µl p-xylene in 1ml PUM buffer
Vortex vigorously for 30 seconds or place in a shaker for 2 minutes (for many samples)
Incubate static at 37 o C for 15 minutes
Carefully extract 200µl of the aqueous phase and add to 800µl PUM buffer in a cuvette
Record OD 600 for each P-xylene xoncentration
Present each sample s a percentage of cells in the aqueous phase relative to PUM buffer with no p-xylene
OD 600nm Xµl p-xylene/ OD 600nm PUM only = % cells in aqueous phase
creator: Eadewunm
